message: WMI-3 attacker content into authoritative position (attacker-pointer-into-field): content is installed into struct field 'qdisc_skb_head.head' — the position the confused consumer later follows as a trusted reference. [mechanism:attacker-pointer-into-field;indicates=WMI-3] [mem:struct=qdisc_skb_head;field=head;offset=0] [oracle:assert=head holds trusted, not attacker-determined, content;assume=externally-originated content installed into the field]
